name: python3-executing
title: python3-executing
summary: Inspect Python AST node being executed
description:
Inspect Python AST node being executed
Get information about what a frame is currently doing,
particularly the Abstract Syntax Tree node being executed.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-executing because Inspect Python AST node being executed.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-executing as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-executing with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-executing --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
